vocab.meaning: cảm thấy vô cùng hạnh phúc, sung sướng
vocab.example: I was on cloud nine whenever my dad announced a weekend road trip to the countryside.

vocab.meaning: làm cho ai đó bận rộn (để không thấy chán)
vocab.example: My mother used to bring plenty of picture books to keep me occupied during those long, monotonous drives.

vocab.meaning: đi con đường dài hơn nhưng có cảnh đẹp
vocab.example: My parents always preferred to take the scenic route, which allowed me to admire the rolling hills and local wildlife.

vocab.meaning: một điều gì đó mới mẻ và thú vị
vocab.example: Getting out of the crowded city in our old sedan felt like a breath of fresh air for a curious child like me.

vocab.meaning: thiu thiu ngủ, dần dần chìm vào giấc ngủ
vocab.example: The gentle vibration of the car would often cause me to drift off to sleep before we even reached the highway.
Those car journeys really helped broaden my horizons by showing me life beyond my small neighborhood.

vocab.meaning: ở trong môi trường/hoàn cảnh mà mình yêu thích và phát huy tốt nhất
vocab.example: I was truly in my element in the backseat, equipped with my Walkman and a bag of snacks.

vocab.meaning: những phần thú vị hoặc quan trọng nhất
vocab.example: Stopping at roadside diners for ice cream was definitely one of the highlights of our summer trips.

vocab.meaning: cảm thấy nhàm chán vì cuộc sống lặp đi lặp lại
vocab.example: Whenever I felt stuck in a rut with schoolwork, a quick car trip to the beach was the perfect remedy.

vocab.meaning: một thành tích đáng tự hào
vocab.example: Being allowed to sit in the front passenger seat for the first time felt like a real feather in my cap as a kid.
